name: vox-plugins
description: VoX's fork of Claude Code plugins. Currently: discord (messaging channel with access control) and scheduler (deliver messages to your future self).

plugins.name: discord
plugins.description: Discord messaging bridge with built-in access control. Manage pairing, allowlists, and policy via /discord:access.

plugins.name: scheduler
plugins.description: Schedule messages to be delivered back into your Claude session at a future time. One-shot or repeating, persists across restarts.
